title: ErGear Dual Monitor Stand for 13 to 32 Inch Screens, Dual Monitor Arm Ergonomic Viewing Angle - Adjustable Tilt 90°/ Swivel 180°/ Rotate 360°/ VESA 75/100mm
features: Hold 2 Ultra Monitors - Dual monitor stand made of heavy sturdy steel tubing and brilliant bit of kit, fits 13"-32" large pc monitor, weight capacity up to 8kg/arm. Dual monitor arm can hold the large monitor on the desk very well and is rock solid than other dual monitor stand in marketplace.

Angle Adjustable Dual Monitor Stand - We require our dual monitor stand must be more fit ergonomic viewing angle design when it is producing, so this dual monitor mount with full range of motion function: tilt 90° to adjust the monitor screen angle from up and down, swivel 180° horizontal movement, and rotate 360° to make the landscape monitor to portrait monitor, suitable for different viewing needs.

Height Adjustable Dual Monitor Arm - This dual monitor stand allows you adjust your monitor height. In terms of vertical adjustments you can raise and lower both monitors together easily, but because of the dual monitor arm belongs one main vertical pole, so the arms move up or down together only with a same height.

Easy Installation - Our dual monitor stand includes all installation accessories, no need additional purchase more. This dual monitor arm comes with 2 separate mounting choice: clamp"C" (fits desk thickness max 8cm) and grommet mounting(fits desk thickness max 5.5cm), follow the guide will be easy.

Save Desk Space - ErGear dual monitor stand with the concealed wiring design to hold the cords and keep them organized, keep your desk tidier, at the same time, this dual monitor arm get your 2 monitors up and improve your workspace, make you visually and work more comfortable, especially suitable for who like get more space from the desk.

Each monitor arm supports up to 8 kg. This dual monitor mount allows you to tilt, swivel and rotate your monitor for a better angle. ErGear EGCM1 dual monitor stand is designed to improve comfort and productivity with eye-level viewing and flexible adjustment. The dual monitor arm's multiple points of articulation enable smooth and precise monitor positioning.
